entries.title: MDOTM raises $27m for AI investment platform
entries.summary: MDOTM Ltd., the global provider of AI-driven investment solutions for Asset and Wealth Management companies, today announced the close of a $27 million growth equity round led by Expedition Growth Capital.

entries.title: The Weekender: The Star-Spangled Receipt
entries.summary: Every July, America gathers around the grill, gazes at the sky and asks the same timeless question. Can liberty be itemized? The answer, increasingly, is yes. It comes with hot dogs, surge-priced airfare, a cooler that cost more than expected, and at least one uncle explaining that fireworks were better when they were dangerous. entries.title: ZEN.COM Launches Mastercard Click to Pay Across Europe and Singapore
entries.summary: European FinTech ZEN.COM has expanded its financial platform to include Mastercard Click to Pay. This feature joins a platform that already includes multicurrency accounts, foreign exchange, instant cashback, purchase protection and everyday payments, ZEN.COM said in a Friday (July 3) press release. The integration of Mastercard Click to Pay is available to the 1.5 million […] The post ZEN.C

entries.title: Texas Attorney General Investigates StubHub Over World Cup Ticket Cancellations
entries.summary: The Texas Office of the Attorney General (OAG) is investigating reports that ticket marketplace StubHub is cancelling or failing to provide World Cup tickets that fans have purchased. The OAG has received reports that StubHub cancelled tickets days or hours before the game’s kickoff, Attorney General Ken Paxton said in a Friday (July 3) press […] The post Texas Attorney General Investigates

entries.title: Klarna Expands App Features With Money Wellness Partnership
entries.summary: Klarna users can now access a free financial health check delivered by financial well-being provider Money Wellness through the Klarna app. Money Wellness’ Money MOT offers users a personalized picture of their finances along with advice about everyday budgeting, making the most of their income and managing debts, the companies said in a Friday (July […] The post Klarna Expands App Features

entries.title: Signicat and TrustTech partner to bring reusable identity to European digital wallets
entries.summary: Signicat, the European digital identity leader and trust services provider, and TrustTech, the digital trust infrastructure company specialising in identity verification, reusable compliance checks and trusted signatures, today announced a partnership to help regulated businesses build reusable identity processes through private wallet ecosystems.

entries.title: Tradeweb Integrates Kalshi Data Into Institutional Trading Workflows
entries.summary: Tradeweb Markets, which is also a minority investor in Kalshi, has launched a dedicated prediction market data suite on its platform, integrating real-time event probabilities from Kalshi alongside traditional fixed-income, credit, and equity market data. entries.title: Inside Prediction Markets: Lawsuits Mount as New Products and Partnerships Keep Coming
entries.summary: Prediction markets continued moving into mainstream financial infrastructure this week, even as the legal battle over who gets to regulate them intensified. The CFTC and several U.S. states escalated their fight over event contracts, Cboe introduced a regulated binary options product with a familiar prediction market payoff, and Polymarket expanded its football portfolio with the Bundesliga. entries.title: Visa Redefines Its Role in Travel With the Global Launch of Visa Destinations
entries.summary: A new consumer Visa travel platform is now live across 10 locations, including flagship cities such as Paris, London and New York City, with more destinations to be added later this year. This platform connects Visa cardholders with curated experiences and exclusive access aligned to passion-led travel pillars through a consumer mobile-first platform.
